zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret FitzGerald於1472年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼波其時，她的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare17歲，母親Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare15歲。她於1486年與Sir Piers Butler在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年8月9日在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret FitzGerald于1472年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼波其时，她的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare17岁，母亲Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare15岁。她于1486年与Sir Piers Butler在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年8月9日在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret FitzGerald was born in 1472, in Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Ireland, her father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, was 17 and her mother, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, was 15. She married Sir Piers Butler in 1486, in County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 August 1542, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret FitzGerald est née en 1472, à Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Piers Butler en 1486, à County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret FitzGerald 1472 in Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare 17 und ihre Mutter Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare 15. Sie hat 1486 in County Kilkenny, Irland Sir Piers Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1542 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret FitzGerald è nata il nel 1472 nel Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, sua padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Piers Butler nel 1486, nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret FitzGeraldが1472年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーブルンチャーチで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildareは17歳，母Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildareは15歳であった。1486年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーでSir Piers Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年8月9日に故郷で70歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret FitzGerald(이)가 1472년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 번c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1486년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 Sir Piers Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 8월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret FitzGerald nasceu em 1472, em Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Piers Butler em 1486, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret FitzGerald родилась в 1472 г. в местности бурнчурч, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Piers Butler в 1486 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 августа 1542 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret FitzGerald nació en 1472, en Burnchurch, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Piers Butler en 1486, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1542, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
